defaults.heading: Ahoy — I'm Dean.
defaults.body:
Better known as **Dean on Deck**. Whether you're sailing solo or rallying the whole crew for a celebration, I make booking your Virgin Voyages cruise effortless — start to gangway.

As a Gold-Certified Virgin Voyages First Mate, I'll handle the details, unlock the perks, and point you to the best spots onboard. You just show up and sail.

Ready to chase the horizon? Pure happiness, zero stress. Let's do this.

defaults.imageAlt: The scarlet-hulled Virgin Voyages ship at sea
defaults.heading: Virgin reinvented what cruising means.
defaults.lede: Smaller ships. Bolder design. An energy that feels more boutique hotel than floating buffet — and absolutely no one under 18.
checklist: Kid-free sailings with a genuinely sophisticated crowd
Michelin-inspired dining included — no surcharges, no buffets
Stylish, modern ships built by designers, not committees
Premium entertainment and a real after-dark scene
Wellness-forward: spa, fitness, and sea-air everything

defaults.heading: RockStar perks, *handled.*
defaults.lede: RockStar Quarters are Virgin's VIP experience — and it starts the moment you reach the terminal. I'll match you to the right tier and lock in the early booking windows.
coreItems: Richard's Rooftop — private sundeck, bar & nightly happy hour
A dedicated RockStar Agent for dining, shows & requests
Priority dining (120 days) & Shore Things (135 days)
VIP boarding through a private entrance + priority off
In-room bar — first round of full-size bottles on the house
Private section at the Beach Club at Bimini
megaItems: Unlimited drinks up to $25 + two bottles of wine daily
Bottomless in-room bar, replenished every day
Private transfers within 50 miles, or port parking

defaults.heading: Your money. *Your vacation.*
defaults.lede: No booking fees — ever. Where other agencies pile service charges on top of supplier rates, I work to land the best price and pass the savings straight to you. Most bookings come with extras like Sailor Loot and priority boarding. You work hard so you can play hard — I'll handle the rest.

pillars.title: Every journey, an adventure
pillars.body: Unique travel experiences that ignite your sense of wonder — every voyage crafted to be filled with unforgettable moments.

pillars.title: Placeholder perks, unlocked
pillars.body: I keep a supply of My Next Virgin Voyage certificates: book through me and take an immediate $300 off your fare plus Sailor Loot, stackable with group bonuses and online promotions.

pillars.title: The finest Shore Things
pillars.body: I'll help you find and book the excursions that elevate the trip — cultural deep-dives or pure adrenaline, truly memorable either way.

ports.label: Ports — ports of call marquee & grid

defaults.heading: Where shall we point *the bow?*
defaults.lede: A few of the routes sailors love. Dreaming of Iceland, Alaska, or somewhere off the map? Just ask — I'll chart it.

defaults.heading: Unforgettable Virgin Voyages.
defaults.lede: Discover captivating adventures beyond the waves — every photo below is from Dean's own sailings.

items.alt: Dean in a helmet and harness on a zipline platform above the Dominican Republic coast
items.d: Itineraries that showcase hidden gems and must-see spots — think the Dominican Republic, done right.

items.alt: Dean on a Santorini terrace with the caldera and a Virgin ship anchored below
items.d: Exclusive sailing experiences aboard Virgin Voyages with premium amenities and stunning ocean views. Greece, anyone?

items.alt: A glass of champagne beside the printed tasting menu at Test Kitchen on board
items.d: Savor local flavors with gourmet dining experiences crafted by top chefs on and off the ship.

items.alt: Dean on a canal boat gliding past the gabled houses of Amsterdam
items.d: Engage with the rich history and vibrant culture of every region through guided tours and local interactions. Amsterdam awaits.

items.alt: Feet up on the warm deck at Sky Lagoon, looking out over the still Icelandic sea
items.d: Relax and rejuvenate with yoga, spa treatments, and meditation. Sky Lagoon, Iceland is calling.

items.alt: Dean in a snorkel mask reaching toward the camera in the turquoise water off Anguilla
items.d: Snorkeling, hiking, and more — tailored to your interests and skill level. Anguilla sets the bar.

defaults.heading: Notes from the *latest sailings.*
defaults.lede: Ports I've walked, tours I've tested, nights worth staying up for — straight from Dean's deck log, camera roll included.

items.alt: A waterfall thundering into a green gorge outside Seattle
items.d: Seattle is incredible — Pike Place Market and the Space Needle define the skyline, and beyond the city you'll find breathtaking waterfalls and a world-class culinary scene.

items.alt: Dean dockside in front of the Swiftsure catamaran in Port Townsend
items.d: Out of Port Townsend, the Swiftsure is a high-speed, wave-piercing catamaran with a wrap-around viewing deck — prime territory for getting up close with the whales.

items.alt: Dean beside the carved eagle at the Sitka, Alaska welcome sign
items.d: Wildlife cruises past sea otters, whales, and bears; an Alaskan seafood feast at Fin Island Lodge; kayaking glacier-carved fjords. A bucket-list stop — book Shore Things early.

items.alt: Dean in red light under the Scarlet Night neon sign on board
items.d: Virgin's ship-wide immersive party replaces stuffy formal nights — pop-up performances, flash mobs, and acrobatics, ending in a late-night pool party. Express yourself.

items.alt: Dean's selfie beneath the Space Needle against a clear blue sky
items.d: A must-see that truly stands out. From the scenery to the atmosphere, it's the kind of place that stays with you long after you leave.

items.alt: Dean waving from the pier with a Virgin Voyages ship towering behind him
items.d: Nothing beats touching down somewhere new. Meeting people and diving into vibrant cultures enriches life in ways words can't capture. Now it's your turn to chase the horizon.

instagramCta.label: Instagram CTA — follow the journey band

defaults.imageAlt: Dean relaxing in the red rope hammock on his Virgin Voyages balcony
defaults.heading: Life at sea, on the feed.
defaults.body: Cruise moments, the latest deals, and life at sea with Dean on Deck — new ports every week.

items.q: Dean is the absolute best. He spent hours making sure we got the exact suite I wanted. He genuinely cares — the only first mate we'll ever use.
Dean has made sure to take care of the small details to ensure we always have the best quality and value for our itineraries. Dean has the magic. Highly recommended.
He'll research every question you have and get fast results. Thanks Dean on Deck for making my trips stress-free and a fun vacation.
The attention to detail and personalized experiences were top-notch. I felt pampered and adventurous. Highly recommend.
Dean elevated our Virgin Voyages experience beyond expectations — from RockStar service to unique excursions, every detail tailored perfectly.
Premium vs Essential vs Base — what's the difference?

body.text: The most polished non-suite path: Premium WiFi for two devices with streaming, a 60-day dining window, a $15 nightly bar tab per Sailor, priority pre-voyage support, guaranteed cabin selection with changes allowed, and maximum name-change flexibility.

The balanced middle: Classic WiFi for one device, a 45-day dining window, guaranteed cabin selection with changes allowed, date changes outside 45 days, and fellow-Sailor name changes until 48 hours before sailing.

Base is the budget tradeoff, not "the normal fare" — stricter rules, a later dining window, and fewer ways to fix the booking later. Lock-It-In only makes sense when savings matter more than cabin choice and flexibility.

items.q: How does the Pay-In-Full discount work?

body.text: Book at least 365 days before sailing, select Pay-In-Full at checkout, and pay the entire invoice — fare, taxes, fees, and optional protection — within two hours of booking.
10% off the voyage fare (taxes, fees, and add-ons excluded). It stacks with second-sailor promotions and MNVV placeholder credits.
XL Sea Terrace, Central Sea Terrace, Sea Terrace, Limited View Sea Terrace, Sea View, and Insider. Lock-It-In cabins are excluded.
I maintain a supply of MNVV certificates. Book through me with one of these placeholders and you can receive an immediate $300 discount off your voyage fare plus Sailor Loot (onboard credit).
MNVV combines with Sailor Bonus Loot, group booking bonuses, and seasonal online promotions — I'll line them all up for you.

items.q: Already booked? Can Dean take over my booking?

body.text: If you booked in the last 30 days and haven't paid in full, I may be able to become your First Mate. You keep the same confirmation number, cabin, and rate — only the agency of record changes.
Transfer rules depend on timing, payment status, and fare type. If it's possible, I'll walk you through it; if not, I'll tell you straight.

defaults.heading: Book it yourself, *or let me make ship happen.*

way1.title: Book it yourself
way1.body: Ready to dive in? Book through my direct link and you still get the extras — qualifying Sea Terrace and RockStar bookings come loaded with Sailor Loot for spa days, cocktails, or whatever floats your boat.

way2.title: Book with me
way2.body: I can offer exclusive extras beyond the link: personalized cabin picks, an MNVV certificate if you don't have one, and the absolute best deal for a cruise tailored just for you. Tell me where you want to go.

defaults.heading: A different kind of *getaway?*
defaults.lede: We love Virgin's bold, adults-only energy — but it isn't the perfect fit for every traveler. Family reunion, ultra-luxury escape, or specialty charter: request me by name as your Travel Advisor, or reach out and I'll handle every detail.

items.d: The ultimate choice for multi-generational families — groundbreaking onboard thrills and private island destinations.
Sophisticated resort-style design, elevated dining, and curated global itineraries.
All-inclusive ultra-luxury, intimate small ships, and immersive butler-serviced expeditions.
The world's premier all-gay resort and cruise charters — unparalleled entertainment, unforgettable community.

defaults.coming: **Coming soon:** Disney Cruise Line, Norwegian Cruise Line, and Princess Cruises join the lineup — plus one special line. Stay tuned, or email me with questions and bookings in the meantime.
